text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond and I go watch the Kikuka Sho,
where Kitasan Black has an incredible race and
secures first place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inspired, Satono Diamond requests additional
training the next day. However, excessive training
can lead to injuries.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To help vent some of that excess excitement, we
opt to break jinxes at the academy as a form of
less physically demanding training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With some help from some friends, including
Mejiro Palmer, we successfully break ten jinxes!
Satono Diamond seems quite satisfied!
